subject: Re: Bedrock provisioned-throughput quote -- following up
body_text:
Hi Quentin,

Circling back on the quote I sent on the 17th for 2 PT units at the Sonnet 4.6 tier. We can hold the pricing until end of next week, but the rate increase across our enterprise tier kicks in June 8.

Let me know if you've had a chance to discuss internally and whether you'd like me to set up a call with one of our solutions architects to walk through the migration plan we drafted.

Happy to extend the hold if you need another week, just let me know.

Best,
Priya
